summary: Data Analyst & AI Engineer with hands-on experience turning raw data into actionable insights and building intelligent systems. Proficient in Python-based analysis and machine learning pipelines, with advanced skills in Power BI and Tableau for business intelligence. Passionate about bridging the gap between data science and real-world decision-making.

bullets: Analyzed complex financial datasets for a U.S. car retail corporation, identifying revenue trends and pricing patterns that informed executive-level business decisions.

Diagnosed and resolved critical data quality issues in a CRM system  profiled the full dataset, traced root causes of inconsistencies, and delivered a structured remediation roadmap adopted by the engineering team.

Built and deployed 4 end-to-end predictive models (customer churn, breast cancer classification, fuel consumption regression, and CRM ticket auto-routing) using Scikit-learn, TensorFlow, and Keras  reducing manual ticket triage time and improving model accuracy across all projects.
Developed an AI-powered CV generator using Python and Streamlit, delivering a dynamic, ATS-optimized tool that boosted user engagement by 40%.

education.degree: MSc in data science and Artificial Intelligence

projects.name: Smart CV Builder
bullets: Architected an AI-powered CV generator with live preview, skill vault management, and job-description tailoring via Claude API.
Implemented real-time streaming responses and session state management for a seamless editing experience.

projects.name: CRM Ticket Auto-Router
bullets: Built a multi-class text classification model to automatically categorize and route incoming CRM support tickets to the correct department.
Reduced manual triage effort and improved first-response routing accuracy using TF-IDF vectorization and ensemble classifiers.

projects.name: Customer Churn Prediction
bullets: Developed a binary classification pipeline to predict customer churn, enabling proactive retention strategies.
Applied feature engineering, SMOTE for class imbalance, and hyperparameter tuning to maximize recall on the minority class.
